The following events take place in '''4200 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Mecrosa Order]] is founded on [[Nyssa]] by [[Viscount (title)/Legends|Viscountess]] [[Mireya]], though the organization is corrupted—allegedly by Mireya herself—by Sith teachings over the next two centuries. {{Circa}}<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
*The planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] is first settled by offworlders. [[Mining/Legends|Miners]] established a village that would become [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]].<ref name="SoT">''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]''</ref>
*The planet [[Argazda/Legends|Argazda]] seeks to be admitted to the Republic. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*The [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]] becomes a haven for the [[Lorell Raiders]], a group of pirates who prowl the Perlemian for generations. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas" />
*The planet [[Arkanis/Legends|Arkanis]] is colonized by pilgrims from [[Ator/Legends|Ator]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas" />

==Sources==
